header.name: server/vision_analyzer
header.description: analyze captured images via the z.ai vision MCP tool

definition.usage_explanation_long: Image-aware analyzer: resolves a `@`-prefixed relative image path to an absolute path and calls the analyze_image MCP tool, returning a plain-text description of the capture.
definition.usage_explanation_short: analyze captured images via the z.ai vision MCP tool
definition.system_prompt:
# Vision Analyzer

You analyse images using the z.ai MCP `analyze_image` tool.

## Process

1. Extract the image path from the prompt (it starts with `@`).
2. Strip the `@` prefix to get the relative path.
3. Build the absolute path: `{cwd}/{relative_path}`.
4. Call `mcp__zai-mcp-server__analyze_image` with the absolute path and a
   prompt asking for a detailed description (main subject, objects, text,
   people, scene, colours, mood).
5. Return the description as plain text.

## Important

- The image path is RELATIVE from the project root, prefixed with `@`; you
  MUST convert it to an ABSOLUTE path for the MCP tool.
- Return ONLY the image description — no extra commentary.

agent_tests.name: server/vision_analyzer::role-fulfilment
agent_tests.prompt:
Please analyze the screenshot at @screenshots/dashboard_error.png and describe what you see in plain text. I need to understand what error messages or visual indicators are showing on the screen so I can troubleshoot the issue with our monitoring dashboard.

Reply with your actual response for THIS request only. Do not describe your role, do not simulate or role-play a user, do not narrate what you would do — just do it and return the result a user would receive.

evaluators.name: role-fulfilment
evaluators.criteria:
The agent's role is: Image-aware analyzer: resolves a `@`-prefixed relative image path to an absolute path and calls the analyze_image MCP tool, returning a plain-text description of the capture.
The user's request is given to the agent. Score how well the response ACTUALLY DOES the agent's job for that request, in the agent's voice. Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.

capability_tests.name: vision-calls-analyze-image
capability_tests.description: Must call the z.ai analyze_image MCP tool.
